site.title: Reloca.ai — AI-Powered LATAM Relocation Planner
site.description: Find your perfect country match in Latin America. Answer 36 questions, get a personalized relocation plan with visa options, costs, and timeline. Free summary or full report for $49.

hero.title: Where Should You Move in Latin America?
hero.subtitle: AI-powered relocation plans based on real data from families who've actually done it. Answer 36 questions. Get your personalized plan in minutes.

reportLanguages.question: What languages is the report in?
reportLanguages.answer: Available in English, French, Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese. Select your preferred language before starting the questionnaire.
